It only creates interfaces and contract connections based on a static ABI. No data mutations, external calls, or untrusted data handling are present.\n\n- **Risk & Malware Scores:** Both are 0, which aligns with the benign nature described.\n\n- **Assessment:** The reasoning is sound.
